title: ‘Super Mario Galaxy Movie’ Adds Fox McCloud in ‘Smash Bros.’ Crossover
summary: Is there a “Super Smash Bros.” movie on the horizon? It sure seems like that’s what “The Super Mario Galaxy Movie” is building up to, with the surprise announcement Thursday that Fox McCloud, of the “Star Fox” and “Super Smash Bros.” video games, is joining the film. title: Enthusiast ‘lands’ on the moon using hardware from the 1980s — ZX Spectrum home computer with 3.5 MHz CPU and 48KB of memory power Kerbal space flight
summary: YouTuber Scott Manley demonstrated using a ZX Spectrum home computer launched in 1982 to land a spacecraft on the Kerbal Space Program spaceflight simulator.
